addons.name: Desktop MCP
addons.description: Desktop automation MCP for the AI agent: read-only enumeration of top-level windows and UI-Automation element trees, PLUS per-window screenshots the vision model can see (PrintWindow - never steals focus, C3-safe), with privacy redaction of sensitive apps and scope-gated capture. Read-only preview (no click/type yet). Ships its own AefosDesktopMcp.exe.
